configs.name: baseline_no_entry_gate
configs.description: 当前入口，不限制期权型低估买入

configs.name: ratio_1p15
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时要求价格/债底 <= 1.15

configs.name: ratio_1p25
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时要求价格/债底 <= 1.25

configs.name: ratio_1p35
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时要求价格/债底 <= 1.35

configs.name: ratio_1p5
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时要求价格/债底 <= 1.5

configs.name: bad_signal_max_0
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时最多允许 0 个弱势信号

configs.name: bad_signal_max_1
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时最多允许 1 个弱势信号

configs.name: bad_signal_max_2
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时最多允许 2 个弱势信号

configs.name: ratio_1p2_signal_0
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.2 且弱势信号 <= 0

configs.name: ratio_1p2_signal_1
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.2 且弱势信号 <= 1

configs.name: ratio_1p2_signal_2
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.2 且弱势信号 <= 2

configs.name: ratio_1p3_signal_0
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.3 且弱势信号 <= 0

configs.name: ratio_1p3_signal_1
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.3 且弱势信号 <= 1

configs.name: ratio_1p3_signal_2
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.3 且弱势信号 <= 2

configs.name: ratio_1p4_signal_0
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.4 且弱势信号 <= 0

configs.name: ratio_1p4_signal_1
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.4 且弱势信号 <= 1

configs.name: ratio_1p4_signal_2
configs.description: 期权型候选买入要求价格/债底 <= 1.4 且弱势信号 <= 2

configs.name: option_share_max_0p9
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时要求期权低估占比 <= 0.9

configs.name: option_share_max_0p95
configs.description: 期权型候选买入时要求期权低估占比 <= 0.95
